title: Infosys Collaborates with Sentara to Scale Enterprise AI Adoption in Healthcare Services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Sentara on June 24, 2026 to create a scalable foundation for AI-driven transformation in healthcare services. The collaboration uses Infosys Topaz Fabric to support AI strategy, reference architectures, AI-first SDLC modernization, governance and production scaling across hospital and enterprise workflows. The stated objectives include improving efficiency, supporting clinicians and staff, enhancing patient and member experiences, and delivering measurable value across clinical, operational and digital domains. No contract value, duration or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys is leveraging Infosys Topaz Fabric, described as a purpose-built agentic services suite, as part of the collaboration.

key_facts.fact: The framework is intended to support AI strategy and road-mapping, reference architectures, AI-first SDLC modernization and governance for scaling AI across core hospital and enterprise workflows.

key_facts.fact: The collaboration emphasizes responsible AI design, enterprise guardrails and operational readiness to move AI from experimentation to production across healthcare systems.
